Attach your own Supabase database to pro: Attach your own Supabase database to projects you create. Keys are encrypted and stored securely.
Enter your Supabase project's connection: Enter your Supabase project's connection details below.
How do I get these values?: How do I get these values?
Follow these steps in your Supabase dash: Follow these steps in your Supabase dashboard, then copy each value into the form. Supabase has a free plan — no credit card required.
In your Supabase dashboard, click New pr: In your Supabase dashboard, click New project. Give it a name, set a strong Database password — you will need it again in step 4, so save it somewhere safe — pick the region closest to your users, then click Create new project. It takes about a minute to provision.
Open your project home page. Copy the pr: Open your project home page. Copy the project URL (it looks like https://xxxx.supabase.co) and paste it into the Supabase URL field.
Go to Project Settings → API Keys. Copy: Go to Project Settings → API Keys. Copy the Publishable key into Publishable Key. Then Reveal and copy the Secret key into Secret Key — keep this one private, it grants full access.
Click Connect at the top, choose Session: Click Connect at the top, choose Session pooler (it works on IPv4 networks for free) and the URI type. Copy the connection string into DB Connection String, then replace [YOUR-PASSWORD] with the database password you set in step 1.
Once all five values are filled in, save: Once all five values are filled in, save the connection and use Test Connection to confirm it works.
